title: neotina isoneura
intro: Neotina isoneura, also known as the Neotinea ustulata, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is believed to have medicinal properties due to its alkaloid content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and acting as an antiseptic, making it useful for treating wounds and skin issues. Traditionally, Neotina isoneura was used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
